ground_truth.title: Insurance for Rideshare and Delivery Drivers | Uber
ground_truth.main_content: Whether you are logged on or have accepted a rideshare or delivery trip, Uber's insurance meets—or exceeds—the required coverage. If you've been in an accident, here's what to do.
with: Whether you are logged on or have accepted a rideshare or delivery trip, Uber's insurance meets—or exceeds—the required coverage.
If you've been in an accident, here's what to do.
without: Log in to your Uber account
Sign up to ride, drive, and get delivery
